llm_and_agentic_ai.name: CAGPT
llm_and_agentic_ai.subtitle: Financial Audit & Compliance LLM
llm_and_agentic_ai.description: Enterprise grade LLM system designed to streamline auditing, accounting, and compliance workflows.
key_contributions: Designed and implemented RAG pipelines for querying financial databases.
Automated compliance verification against IFRS and GAAP standards.
Engineered automated generation of structured enterprise audit reports.

llm_and_agentic_ai.name: Echo AI
llm_and_agentic_ai.subtitle: Voice AI Agent
llm_and_agentic_ai.description: High performance, low latency voice based conversational AI agents for real time human like interaction.
key_contributions: Implemented reasoning and dialogue management logic using GPT-4o Mini.
Integrated semantic retrieval systems using Voyage AI embeddings.
Developed end to end real time STT/TTS pipelines with minimal latency.

healthcare_and_predictive_ai.name: VibranEat
healthcare_and_predictive_ai.subtitle: AI Powered Personalized Diet Planner
healthcare_and_predictive_ai.description: Ensemble learning system providing personalized nutrition based on health profiles.
key_contributions: Integrated multi model outputs for 7 day meal plans filtered by BMI and allergens.
Authored research paper comparing ensemble architectures vs. deep learning models.

healthcare_and_predictive_ai.name: HealthGuard AI
healthcare_and_predictive_ai.subtitle: Early Disease Detection Portal
healthcare_and_predictive_ai.description: Intelligent healthcare portal predicting critical diseases at early stages.
key_contributions: Designed a Meta Classifier architecture to route symptoms to specialized models.
Focused on interpretability and high precision diagnostics.

healthcare_and_predictive_ai.name: Healytic AI
healthcare_and_predictive_ai.subtitle: Predictive Health & Wellness Orchestrator
healthcare_and_predictive_ai.description: An end to end healthcare assistant that leverages NLP and Random Forest classifiers to predict diseases from symptom descriptions.
key_contributions: Utilized Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Random Forest classifiers to predict diseases from symptom descriptions.
Generated holistic recovery plans including OTC medication suggestions, specialized diet plans, and medical-safe workout routines.

nlp_and_data_science.name: Senticore
nlp_and_data_science.subtitle: Sentiment Analysis with LSTM
key_contributions: Trained LSTM models for sentiment classification with high temporal awareness.
Optimized for real time social media and customer feedback loops.

nlp_and_data_science.name: DigitGen DCGAN
nlp_and_data_science.subtitle: Synthetic Handwritten Digit Generator
key_contributions: Trained a Deep Convolutional Generative Adversarial Network (DCGAN) on the MNIST dataset.
Demonstrated adversarial machine learning, competing generator and discriminator to produce high-fidelity synthetic images.

nlp_and_data_science.name: MaskSentinel AI
nlp_and_data_science.subtitle: Real Time Face Mask Detection System
key_contributions: Leveraged Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to identify mask compliance in real-time.
Processed live video streams with high accuracy for integration into public safety and healthcare surveillance systems.

nlp_and_data_science.name: Churn Guard
nlp_and_data_science.subtitle: Customer Churn Prediction
key_contributions: Conducted extensive feature engineering on user behavior patterns.
Applied classification algorithms to provide actionable business insights.

engineering_and_simulations.name: COVax
engineering_and_simulations.description: Vaccine & Logistics Management System. A robust C++ administrative console designed to manage large-scale vaccination programs with multi-center stock tracking, secure encrypted login with captcha, and file-based persistence for patient records.

engineering_and_simulations.name: AI Self Driving Car
engineering_and_simulations.description: Navigates simulated environments using reinforcement learning.

engineering_and_simulations.name: Movie Recommendation System
engineering_and_simulations.description: Uses Cosine Similarity and NLP for personalized suggestions.

engineering_and_simulations.name: Epidemic Spread Simulation
engineering_and_simulations.description: Analyzes time and space complexity of disease spread in Python.

engineering_and_simulations.name: Linux Kernel Development
engineering_and_simulations.description: Solved the 'Chain Smoker Problem'; optimized kernel synchronization.

engineering_and_simulations.name: Network Engineering Tool
engineering_and_simulations.description: VOIP and Network Monitoring for retail store chains.
